name: The Fool
upright_meaning: New adventures, fresh starts, innocent trust
reversed_meaning: Reckless decisions, naive choices, too much risk
love: Toh dekh, yeh card bol raha hai ki tum abhi ek naye relationship ki taraf badh rahe ho. Bina koi fear ke apne heart ko express karo. You deserve to feel that excitement!
career: Naya project lo ya business idea explore karo. Tumhara creativity abhi chaotic lag sakta hai but it's actually your strength!
advice: Take that first step which you've been thinking about. Don't overthink - just trust your gut feeling.
emotional_message: Bhai/bahen, tum jaise feel kar rahe ho waisa hi normal hai. Naye cheezein shuru karne mein darr lagta hai, but tum ready ho! 💜

name: The Magician
upright_meaning: Manifestation, using your skills, taking action
love: Tumhe Sirf pyaar ki zaroorat hai? Nahi, tumhare paas wo energy hai jismein tum apne liye sab kuch create kar sakte ho. Abhi se shuru karo!
career: Tumhare paas talent hai, use express karo. Jo idea mann mein aaya hai, usse abhi implement karo. You have everything you need!
advice: Stop waiting for permission. You have all the tools - now use them.
emotional_message: Dekho, tum mein itna power hai ki tum apni duniya bana sakte ho. Bas self-doubt ko door rakhna! 🌟

name: The High Priestess
upright_meaning: Follow your intuition, inner wisdom, secrets
love: Tumhe iss relationship mein kuch baatein feel hoti hain jo words mein express nahi hoti. Apne intuition ko suno - wo tumhe sach bol raha hai.
career: Jo decision tumhare dil mein ho raha hai, wo sahi hai. Analytical thinking ke baad, apne inner voice ko suno.
advice: Take a moment alone. Meditate or just sit quietly - your answers are within you.
emotional_message: Tumhara intuition bahut strong hai. Log kehengele matso, but tum apni feeling par trust karo! 💜

name: The Empress
love: Iss relationship mein tum caring ho raho ho. Apne partner ke saath gentle raho, but apni bhi care karo. Balance important hai!
career: Tum creative energy se bhare hue ho. Apne ideas ko ek form do - create something beautiful!
advice: Nurture yourself first. When you're at peace, everything around you thrives.
emotional_message: Tum ek queen ho! Apni care karo, aur jo tum chaa raho ho wo khud tumhe mil jayega. 💕

name: The Emperor
love: Tum chaa raho ho ki relationship mein structure ho. Boundaries set karo but with love. Control matlo, understand karo!
career: Tum leader ban sakte ho. Apne goals clear karo aur plan ke saath unki taraf badho.
advice: Create structure in your life but stay flexible enough to adapt when needed.
emotional_message: Tum strong ho - apni power ko positively use karo. Tum guide ho, dictator nahi! 🌟

name: The Hierophant
upright_meaning: Learning from mentors, tradition, spiritual guidance
love: Jo cheezein traditionally sahi maani jaati hain, unpar reflect karo. Par apni bhi soch hai - wo bhi valid hai!
career: Kisi mentor ya senior se seekho. Unki guidance tumhe aage le jayegi. Education important hai is field mein!
advice: Seek knowledge from those who have walked the path before you.
emotional_message: Guru milna great hai. Unhe respect karo, but apki bhi soch hai jo matter karti hai! ✨

name: The Lovers
love: Yeh card perfect timing pe aya hai! Tumhe choice karni hai. Apne heart ki suno - wo sabse best guide hai!
career: Doors path hain - ek job ya doora opportunity. Apne values ke hisab se choose karo.
advice: What you choose defines who you are. Choose with your heart, not just your head.
emotional_message: Tumhe janna hai ki choice sahi hai? Tum jis cheez ke liye feel karo wo hi right answer hai! ❤️

name: The Chariot
reversed_meaning: Aggression, lack of direction, feeling stuck
love: Tum fight kar rahe ho apne feelings ke liye? Nahi, aage badho! Determination se, tum jeetoge!
career: Target clear hai? Abhi aage badho. Darr matlo, tum jeetne wale ho!
advice: Your determination will take you where you want to go. Keep moving forward.
emotional_message: Tum hero ho apni kahani ke! Jo bhi raha hai, tum handle kar loge. Believe in yourself! 💪

name: Strength
reversed_meaning: Weakness, lack of patience, giving up
love: Patience rakhna hoga, yaar. Love jaldi nahi hoti. Apne partner ke sath gentle raho, aur wait karo!
career: Success jaldi nahi aata. Patience rakhna padta hai. But tum strong ho - tum jeetne wale ho!
advice: Patience and compassion wins over force. Lead with your heart.
emotional_message: Tum bahut strong ho! Jo tum through kar rahe ho wo easy nahi, but tum capable ho! 💜

name: The Hermit
love: Thoda time alag guzaaroo. Apne aap ko samjho. Answer bahar nahi, andar hai!
career: Apne career par reflect karo. Thoda alag time lo apne thoughts ke liye.
advice: Take time alone to reconnect with yourself. Your answers are within you.
emotional_message: Alone hona zaroori hai sometimes. But darpo mat - tumhare paas apna self hai jo guide karega! ✨

name: Wheel of Fortune
upright_meaning: Destiny turning, positive changes, good luck
reversed_meaning: Bad luck, resistance to change, feeling stuck
love: Toh wheel ghum rahi hai! Kuch naya hona wala hai. Open raho - unexpected aane wala hai!
career: Change coming your way. Jo opportunity aayi hai, usse gruh karo!
advice: Life is changing cycle. Embrace the new chapter coming your way.
emotional_message: Yaar, kuch unexpected ho sakta hai but wo good hai! Open heart se incoming accept karo! 🌈

name: Justice
love: Honesty important hai. Jo baat hai, wo bolt do. Truth se hi trust banata hai!
career: Fair play rakhna. Jo tum kare wo tumhe wapas milega cause and effect hai.
advice: Be honest with yourself and others. What goes around comes around.
emotional_message: Tumhara truth matter karta hai. Apni integrity mat gawavo - yeh tumhari shakti hai! ⚖️

name: The Hanged Man
upright_meaning: New perspective, sacrifice, pausing for clarity
reversed_meaning: Stagnation, feeling stuck, resistance to change
love: Thoda rukko aur socho. Kya tum chaa raho ho really? Pause le lo, answer clarity se aayega!
career: Decision derlod raha hai? Thoda pausekar do. Dusra perspective se dekho!
advice: Let go of the need to control everything. Sometimes pause leads to clarity.
emotional_message: Tension mat lo. Pause lena zaroori hai. Thoda time lo, sab clear ho jayega! 💜

name: Death
reversed_meaning: Fear of change, holding on to the past
love: Purana kuch end ho raha hai - aur yeh good hai! Naya shuru hoga. Change ko embrace karo!
career: Old job ya approach end ho raha hai. Naya opportunity aanewali hai!
advice: Every ending is a new beginning. Embrace transformation.
emotional_message: Darr mat! Transformation painful hai but zaroori hai. Naya better chapter aane wala hai! 🌅

name: Temperance
love: Balance important hai. Over-attachment matlo. Apni bhi life jeeo!
career: Work-life balance rakhna. Overworking matlo - balance se hi productivity aayegi!
advice: Find balance in all things. Moderation leads to harmony.
emotional_message: Tum theek ho - balance rakhna. Overthink mat karo, relaxed raho! ⚖️

name: The Devil
love: Koi attachment jo harmful hai? Usko identify karo. Aur release karo. Tum free ho!
career: Money ya success ke piche bhagna mat. Original passion ko mat bhoolo!
advice: What's holding you back? Name it and break free from it.
emotional_message: Tum bound nahi ho! Jo cheez tumhe constrain kar rahi hai, usse bolt do - tum free ho! 🔥

name: The Tower
upright_meaning: Sudden upheaval, revelation, breaking false foundations
love: Sudden wake-up call aaya? Bol raha hai ki kuch toxic hai. Abhi door jao!
career: Aapki foundation shaky hai. Bani structures check karo aur fix karo!
advice: Sometimes destruction makes way for truth. The tower needed to fall.
emotional_message: Chaos painful hai, but yeh necessary hai. Naya foundation strong hoga! 🗼

name: The Star
reversed_meaning: Lost hope, despair, lack of faith
love: Hope mat gawavo! Tum pyar ke laayak ho. Right person aayega, wait karo!
career: Tumhare paas talent hai. Wo shine karega. Hope rakhna - tum do!
advice: Hold onto faith. Better days are coming.
emotional_message: Tum ek star ho! Apna light mat gawavo. Good things aane wale hain, trust karo! ⭐

name: The Moon
upright_meaning: Intuition, dreams, illusions, following your gut
love: Jo feels kar rahe ho uspar trust karo. Dil ki suno - wo sahi hai!
career: Nayi opportunities mein intuition ka use karo. Jo right lage wo kro!
advice: Trust your intuition. Your dreams may be guiding you.
emotional_message: Tumharagut feeling strong hai. Log kehengele matso, but tum jano! 🌙

name: The Sun
love: Pyar mein success aayi hai! Enjoy karo yeh phase. Bright days ahead hain!
career: Tumjeet rahe ho! Recognition milne wala hai. Celebrate karo!
advice: You've worked hard. Now enjoy the success and clarity.
emotional_message: Tumhe khus hona chahiye! Yeh tumhara moment hai. Enjoy karo! ☀️

name: Judgement
reversed_meaning: Self-doubt, lack of self-worth, ignoring the call
love: Apne past ko forgive karo. Naya chapter shuru hone ke liye zaroori hai!
career: Inner call aaya hai kuch badlavne ka. Listen karo!
advice: Forgive yourself and others. It's time for rebirth.
emotional_message: Past ko chhod do. Tum new ho! Apne aap ko permission do to shine! 🔔

name: The World
reversed_meaning: Incompletion, lack of closure, travel delays
love: Relationship mein full circle aagya! Ab naya shuru hoga. Tum ready ho!
career: Ek big achievement complete hua! Ab travel ya naya opportunity explore karo!
advice: You've completed a major cycle. Now step into new adventures.
emotional_message: Tum ek journey complete kar rahe ho! Another awesome chapter ahead waiting hai! 🌍

name: Ace of Cups
upright_meaning: New emotional beginnings, love, overflowing feelings
love: Nayi feelings aayi hain! Heart full hai pyar se. Express karo unhe!
career: Naya passion mila hai jo work mein feeling dale. Creative approach try karo!
advice: Let your heart guide you. New emotional experiences await.
emotional_message: Aww, tumahre heart mein itna love hai! Express karo, duniya dekhegi! 💕

name: Two of Cups
upright_meaning: Partnership, attraction, mutual respect, love connection
love: Yeh connection special hai! Mutal respect aur attraction hai. Cherish karo!
career: Ek perfect partner ya mentor mila hai. Collaboration se great results aayenge!
advice: Cherish your partnerships. They're the foundation of success.
emotional_message: Yeh bond bohot special hai! Tum lucky ho jo aise insaan mile! 🥰

name: Three of Cups
love: Friends aur family ke saath celebrate karo! Love sabke saath hai!
career: Team celebration time hai! Acche results aaye hain, unhe enjoy karo!
advice: Celebrate your wins with loved ones. Joy multiplies when shared.
emotional_message: Party time! Tum jeet ho, celebrate karo apne logs ke saath! 🎉

name: Four of Cups
upright_meaning: Meditation, introspection, apathy, taking time to reflect
reversed_meaning: Boredom, missing opportunities, lack of focus
love: Thoda time lo apne emotions par. Rush mein mat jao. Reflection zaroori hai!
career: Career reflect karo. Kya change chahiye? Soch samajh kar decide karo!
advice: Take time to reflect. Not every opportunity is the right one.
emotional_message: Thoda pause karo. Soch lo - tumahre paas answer hai! 💭

name: Five of Cups
love: Koi loss hua? Dard hoga, but tum aage badhoge. Time heals, believe karo!
career: Fail hua? Tough hai, but seekho aur try karo. Aage hai bohot kuch!
advice: Lost something? Grieve, then move forward. New adventures await.
emotional_message: Dard zaroori hai toh feel karo. But tum strong ho - tum recover karenge! 💪

name: Six of Cups
upright_meaning: Nostalgia, sweet memories, past connections, innocence
reversed_meaning: Living in the past, unrealistic expectations
love: Past ki sweet memories aapke liye bohot important hain. Unhe cherish karo!
career: Career path mein early achievements ya mentors yaad aaye. Unhe inspiration banao!
advice: Let past memories inspire you, but don't live there.
emotional_message: Purani yaadein sweet hain, but present bhi beautiful hai. Dono enjoy karo! 🌸

name: Seven of Cups
upright_meaning: Choices, fantasy vs reality, daydreaming, many options
love: Options bahut hain, but sirf ek choice karni hai. Dil se socho!
career: Bohot opportunities hain. Best choose karo jo tumahre liye right ho!
advice: Too many options confuse. Clarify your goals first.
emotional_message: Options dekh ke mat confuse hogo. Apni instinct par trust karo! 🤔

name: Eight of Cups
upright_meaning: Walking away, seeking truth, disappointment, moving on
reversed_meaning: Trying again, returning to what you left
love: Kisi cheez se disappointed ho? Aage badho. Naya milega!
career: Job ya project se frustate ho? Naya opportunity explore karo!
advice: Sometimes walking away is the right choice. Don't look back.
emotional_message: Chhod do jo tumhe khubsurat nahi lagta. Naya journey better hai! 🚶

name: Nine of Cups
love: Tum relationship se satisfied ho! Yeh rare hai. Enjoy karo!
career: Achievement mila hai! Satisfaction feel karo, tumhe mila hai!
advice: You've achieved what you wanted. Now enjoy the satisfaction.
emotional_message: Tum jeet gaye! Feeling amazing hai, right? Yeh moment enjoy karo! 🏆

name: Ten of Cups
upright_meaning: Happiness, family joy, lasting love, harmony
love: Perfect love life! Family harmony complete hai. Yeh treasure protect karo!
career: Work aur personal life balance perfect hai. Family support hai - yeh rare hai!
advice: Protect your harmony. Family love is your foundation.
emotional_message: Yeh family happiness priceless hai! Protect karo, appreciate karo! 👨‍👩‍👧‍👦

name: Page of Cups
upright_meaning: New emotional beginnings, innocent messages, creativity
love: Nayi feelings aayi hain! Innocent hai wo. Let them bloom!
career: Creative side shine kar raha hai. New project try karo!
advice: New emotional adventures await. Embrace your creative side.
emotional_message: Naya feeling itna sweet hai! Bas feel karo aur enjoy karo! 💗

name: Knight of Cups
love: Romantic phase incoming hai! Feelings intense honge. Express karo!
career: Apne emotions ko work mein convert karo. Passion se kaam karo!
advice: Chase your romantic dreams. Lead with your heart.
emotional_message: Romantic moment aaya hai! Take the plunge - won't regret! 💘

name: Queen of Cups
love: Tum emotions se lead kar rahe ho. That's your strength. Care karo but boundaries rakhna!
career: Intuitive leader ho tum. Team ki feelings samajho aur guide karo!
advice: Lead with compassion. Your emotional intelligence is your power.
emotional_message: Tum apni emotions se kaafi strong ho. That makes you special! 💜

name: King of Cups
love: Emotionally mature ho tum. Balance rakhna - that's sexy!
career: Senior role ke liye ready ho. Wisdom se lead karo!
advice: Master your emotions. Balance wisdom with feeling.
emotional_message: Tum emotionally wise ho. Jo tum kar rahe ho wo perfect hai! 👑

name: Ace of Pentacles
love: Practical love important hai. Resources ka balance rakhna!
career: Nayi opportunity aayi hai! Explore karo - success milegi!
advice: New material opportunities are appearing. Take action now.
emotional_message: Opportunity window khul gaya hai! Action lo - success tumhe mil sakti hai! 💰

name: Two of Pentacles
love: Time management important hai. Work aur love balance rakhna!
career: Multitasking zaroori hai. Prioritize karo wisely!
advice: Balance competing priorities. Don't let anything fall.
emotional_message: Bahut kuch handle karna hai? One thing at a time - tum theek karoge! ⚖️

name: Three of Pentacles
love: Together build kar rahe ho. Team effort hai!
career: Team ke saath kaam kar rahe ho. Collaboration perfect hai!
advice: Your achievements come from working with others. Celebrate teamwork.
emotional_message: Teamwork amazing hai! Tum log jo kar rahe ho wo great cheej hai! 🤝

name: Four of Pentacles
love: Security important hai. Emotionally aur financially stable raho!
career: Saving important hai. Emergency fund banao!
advice: Secure your resources wisely. Stability comes first.
emotional_message: Security matlab selfishness nahi. Tumahara future important hai! 💵

name: Five of Pentacles
love: Tough phase hai but jayega. Support lo aur aage badho!
career: Financial struggle hai? Temporary hai. Keep trying!
advice: Every struggle is temporary. Better days are coming.
emotional_message: Tough time hai, but temporary hai. Tum recover karoge! Stay strong! 💪

name: Six of Pentacles
love: Dene aur lena balance rakhna. Generous raho!
career: Give back to others. Charity brings prosperity!
advice: Share your resources. Generosity attracts abundance.
emotional_message: Dene wale ko do milta hai. Tum generous ho - wo beautiful hai! 🤲

name: Seven of Pentacles
reversed_meaning: Impatience, lack of growth, poor investment
love: Relationship build hone mein time lagega. Patience rakhna!
career: Long-term investment karo. Quick returns nahi, sustainable growth chahiye!
advice: Your investments will grow. Have patience and wait.
emotional_message: Harvest time ane wala hai! Be patient, tumari mehnat hasil degi! 🌱

name: Eight of Pentacles
reversed_meaning: Lack of skill development, poor quality work
love: Skills perfection ke liye time do. Mastery important hai!
career: Skill improve karo. Practice se perfect hoti hai!
advice: Dedicate time to skill development. Master your craft.
emotional_message: Practice makes perfect! Har din better banoge - thats the goal! 🔨

name: Nine of Pentacles
love: Independent ho apni life jeete ho. That's attractive!
career: Abundant phase hai! Enjoy your success. You earned it!
advice: You are financially independent. Enjoy your achievements.
emotional_message: Tum self-sufficient ho! Jo banaye wo sab tumahara hai. Proud raho! 💎

name: Ten of Pentacles
love: Family wealth aur security important hai. Future planning karo!
career: Long-term wealth building complete hua hai. Legacy create kar rahe ho!
advice: You've built lasting wealth. Consider your legacy.
emotional_message: Family security tumne banaya hai! Coming generations ke liye inspiration ho tum! 👨‍👩‍👧‍👦

name: Page of Pentacles
upright_meaning: New opportunities, student mindset, material ambitions
love: Learning mode mein ho. Seekho aur grow karo!
career: Career mein naya learning opportunity hai. Grasp karo!
advice: New material ventures are appearing. Be the student.
emotional_message: Naya opportunity exciting hai! Learn karo, grow karo - fun hai! 📚

name: Knight of Pentacles
upright_meaning: Reliable, slow and steady, practical approach
love: Reliable partner ho tum. That's rare - appreciate karo!
career: Consistent worker ho tum. Success guaranteed hai!
advice: Your reliable approach will win. Keep going steadily.
emotional_message: Tum steady ho - wo great quality hai! Log tumpar depend kar sakte hain! 🐢

name: Queen of Pentacles
love: Provider mindset hai. Care karo but apni bhi care karo!
career: Abundance create kar rahe ho. Sustainable growth ensure karo!
advice: Create security for others while maintaining your own wellbeing.
emotional_message: Tum provide kar rahe ho - that's amazing! But apni bhi care lena mat bhoolna! 👑

name: King of Pentacles
upright_meaning: Wealth mastery, business authority, material success
love: Financially aur emotionally secure leader ho. That's powerful!
career: Business mastery achieved! Lead karo aur guide karo!
advice: You've mastered material wealth. Now use it to lead.
emotional_message: Tum wealth master ho! Wealth se positive change la sakte ho - use karo! 💰👑

name: Ace of Swords
upright_meaning: New ideas, mental clarity, breakthrough truth
love: Clarity aayi hai! Ab decision sahi lenge. Truth clear hai!
career: Breakthrough idea mila hai! Express karo, winning start hai!
advice: Mental clarity arrives. Your ideas are ready to be spoken.
emotional_message: Clarity finally! Samajh ajhaise, ab sahi decision lenge! 🗡️

name: Two of Swords
upright_meaning: Difficult choices, decision paralysis, weighing options
reversed_meaning: Analysis paralysis, fear of making decisions
love: Decision mushkil hai? Par koi na koi lena padega. Trust karo!
career: Par choice ke pehle analysis karo. Right decision lene ka time aaya hai!
advice: Make a decision now. Both options have merit, just choose.
emotional_message: Choice mushkil hai but zaroori hai. Tum theek ho - trust yourself! ⚖️

name: Three of Swords
love: Dard hua, naturally hai. Express karo, heal karo. Time lagta hai!
career: Professional heartbreak? Professional betrayal hurt karta hai. Move on karo!
advice: Pain is real but temporary. Let yourself heal.
emotional_message: Heartbreak painful hai, but tum jeet gaye. Healing ongoing hai - be patient! 💔

name: Four of Swords
upright_meaning: Rest, recovery, meditation, taking a break
love: Break zaroori hai. Breathe lo, recover karo. Pause lena sahi hai!
career: Rest important hai. Burnout se baat nahi - relax karo thoda!
advice: Rest to recover. You need peace before the next battle.
emotional_message: Relax karo yaar! Breather lena zaroori hai. Tum theek ho! 😴

name: Five of Swords
upright_meaning: Conflict, winning at cost, verbal battles
love: Conflict difficult hai. But resolution important hai. Talk karo!
career: Work conflict aayi? Professional approach se solve karo. Ego mat aane do!
advice: Conflict resolution require communication. Don't win by being right.
emotional_message: Conflict hard hai but resolve kar sakte ho. Communication is key! 🗣️

name: Six of Swords
upright_meaning: Transition, moving to better place, journey
reversed_meaning: Stuck in transition, refusing to move
love: Transition time hai. Naya journey better hai. Move on karo!
career: New role ya location in pipeline hai. Embrace karo change!
advice: Moving forward to better. Accept the transition.
emotional_message: Change challenging hai but zaroori hai. Naya better space await hai! 🚣

name: Seven of Swords
love: Games mat karo. Direct communication best hai!
career: Strategic approach good hai. But ethical raho - short-term wins diye, long-term damage nahi!
advice: Use wit to navigate, not to harm. Be clever, not cruel.
emotional_message: Tactics sahi hai but chaloality important hai. Direct raho! 🎭

name: Eight of Swords
love: Feel kar raho ho trapped? Bas tum soch rahe ho - reality mein nahi!
career: Career trap feeling? Tum bound nahi ho - naye options explore karo!
advice: Your restrictions are often self-imposed. Break free.
emotional_message: Tum free ho! Jo prison feel kar raha hai wo tumari soch hai. Change your thinking! 🧠

name: Nine of Swords
love: Anxiety zyada ho raha hai? Relax karo - sab theek hoga!
career: Career anxiety common hai but manage kar sakte ho. Take it easy!
advice: Your fears may be exaggerated. Light will come after dark.
emotional_message: Raat bhari hoti hai, but subah zarur aayegi! Anxiety matlo, tum strong ho! 🌙

name: Ten of Swords
love: Pyaar mein betrayal feel hua? Dard hoga, but recover hote hi better milta hai!
career: Professional betrayal? Painful, but resilience build karta hai. Grow from it!
advice: Sometimes things must fall apart to be rebuilt better.
emotional_message: Rock bottom is foundation for rebuild! Tum recover karoge, aur stronger banoge! 💪

name: Page of Swords
love: Curious fase raho. Questions pucho, seekho, understand karo!
career: New ideas innovate karne ke liye ready ho. Communication badhao!
advice: New thoughts are appearing. Express them clearly.
emotional_message: Curiosity great hai! Seekho, pucho, understand karo - yahi growth hai! 📖

name: Knight of Swords
love: Direct approach sahi hai but sensitivity bhi zaruri hai. Balance rakhna!
career: Quick decisions lo! Tum fast thinker ho, use karo!
advice: Your quick thinking is an asset. Use it wisely.
emotional_message: Tum fast thinker ho! But sometimes slow down - balance helps! ⚡

name: Queen of Swords
love: Clear thinking beneficial hai. Truth bolo, kindness ke saath!
career: Objective analysis perfect hai tumahre liye. Wisdom se decisions lo!
advice: Lead with clarity and fairness. Your objectivity is power.
emotional_message: Tum clear thinker ho! Truth powerful hai, but love ke saath bolo! 👸

name: King of Swords
love: Leader mindset perfect hai. Guide karo love ko logically!
career: Intellectual authority achieved! Lead intellectually - wo powerful hai!
advice: Use your intellectual authority to lead fairly.
emotional_message: Tum intellectual leader ho! Wisdom se guide karo - great impact! 👑🗡️

name: Ace of Wands
upright_meaning: New beginnings, inspiration, spark, creative force
love: Naya spark aaya! Excitement feel karo - inspiration perfect timing pe aaya hai!
career: Creative inspiration perfect timing pe aaya! Spark ko flame banao!
advice: Inspiration has struck. Now act on it before it fades.
emotional_message: Spark jag gaya! Ab inspiration ko action mein convert karo - exciting hai! 🔥

name: Two of Wands
upright_meaning: Planning future, big vision, world travel
love: Future visualize karo. Pyar mein bhi dreams rakhna important hai!
career: Career planning perfect hai. Big vision create karo!
advice: Your future vision is big. Start planning now.
emotional_message: Future exciting hai! Plan karo aur dream pursue karo! 🌍

name: Three of Wands
love: Progress aayi hai! Relationship grow ho raha hai. Celebrate karo!
career: Expansion time hai! Team badhao, project advance karo!
advice: Your progress is visible. Reward yourself and keep going.
emotional_message: Growth amazing hai! Tum aage badh rahe ho - that's what matters! 📈

name: Four of Wands
love: Love celebration ka time hai! Happiness share karo logs ke saath!
career: Success achieve hua! Celebrate karo team ke saath!
advice: Celebrate your wins with your community.
emotional_message: Festival vibes! Joy share karo - happiness double hoti hai! 🎊

name: Five of Wands
love: Competition feel ho raha hai? But yeh rivalry not healthy, focus on teamwork!
career: Professional competition aggressive hai. But ethical raho - fair play matters!
advice: Competition brings out the best. Don't fear the challenge.
emotional_message: Competition intense hai but tum karta ho! Best banne ke liye challenge zaroori hai! ⚔️

name: Six of Wands
reversed_meaning: Ego, lack of recognition, failed victory
love: Victory mila! Love mein bhi appreciation karo apne partner ko!
career: Victory milestone achieved! Recognition milna chahiye - tumahara time hai!
advice: You've won publicly. Accept the recognition gracefully.
emotional_message: Tum jeet gaye! Recognition tumhara hai - enjoy karo! 🏆

name: Seven of Wands
love: Challengers aayein? Defend karo apni relationship, boundaries clear rakhna!
career: Career challenge aaya? Stand strong, tum kaam karoge!
advice: Hold your ground. Defense now means victory later.
emotional_message: Stand firm yaar! Challenges aate hain but tum handle karte ho - tum strong ho! 🛡️

name: Eight of Wands
love: Speed action aayi! Express karo fast - quick communication best hai!
career: Fast paced action! Quick decisions lo - swift movement advantage hai!
advice: Action now - move fast before momentum slows.
emotional_message: Quick! Fast action better results deta hai! Jaldi karo! 🏃

name: Nine of Wands
love: Last stand lena pad sakta hai! Persistence important hai. Almost there!
career: Almost complete! Last push dena - tum theek karoge!
advice: One final push to completion. You're almost there.
emotional_message: Bas thoda aur! Persistence jeetati hai - last mein success milti hai! 💪

name: Ten of Wands
love: Bhari responsibility ho? Share karo, single-handed tough hai!
career: Work overload hai? Delegate karo - help lo!
advice: Too heavy? Ask for help. Don't carry alone.
emotional_message: Boht ho raha hai? Support maango - karb uthao not required! 🏋️

name: Page of Wands
love: Naya adventure exciting hai! Explore karo, spontaneity fun hai!
career: Creative spark new! New project spontaneously start karo!
advice: New adventures await. Take action now.
emotional_message: Adventure calling hai! Answer karo - exciting hoga! 🌟

name: Knight of Wands
love: Passionate energy perfect hai! Express karo excitement se!
career: Energy explosive hai! Direct action lo - faster results milenge!
advice: Channel your energy into action. Be passionate and bold.
emotional_message: Passion energy amazing hai! Tum full energy se burn karte ho - thats power! 🔥

name: Queen of Wands
love: Confident aur passionate partner amazing hai! Warmth feel karo!
career: Leadership perfect time hai! Confident lead karo!
advice: Lead with confidence and warmth. Your passion inspires.
emotional_message: Tum confident ho! Passion se inspire karo - thats rare gift! 🌸

name: King of Wands
love: Leader mindset perfect hai. Guide love respectfully!
career: Master-level leadership achieved! Visionary lead karo!
advice: Lead with vision and authority. You've earned it.
emotional_message: Tum master ho apni field ke! Authority naturally aata hai - inspire karo! 👑🔥
